turns.user_message: My shoulders are always tight and heavy lately. I just feel weighed down all the time.
This constant low-grade headache won't go away no matter what I do. I feel like I'm running on fumes.
My whole body feels like it's shutting down and I'm starting to worry. I might need to actually talk to someone about this.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
